name: EnkiAI
description:
Enki is a forward-looking market intelligence platform to accelerate the energy transition. 

Large energy companies use Enki to map emerging tech ecosystems to identify the right partners and minimize the technology risk. 

Unlike existing solutions, Enki connects text data like projects, partnerships, and all company activities 1-2 years earlier than any other tools. 

This enables your business to predict new opportunities faster and stay ahead of the market.
